center.name: Lakefield, Queensland
center.summary: Lakefield, Queensland是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Barking owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The barking owl (Ninox connivens) or barking boobook, also known as the winking owl, is a nocturnal bird species native to mainland Australia and parts of New Guinea and the Moluccas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The barking owl (Ninox connivens) or barking boobook, also known as the winking owl, is a nocturnal bird species native to mainland Australia and parts of New Guinea and the Moluccas
